summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Luna Group VIP Rewards Shop overhaul. All backend APIs working (16/16 tests passed). Frontend rewards-shop page renders correctly with Gift Cards UI, 10% bonus calculations, and proper navigation from Wallet page.
critical_code_review_comments: Gift card purchase API shows 'Coming Soon' alert - this is intentional TODO in code (line 117-118 in rewards-shop.tsx)
CherryHub CRM sync is MOCKED due to auth scope limitations (403 error for Members-Points.Manage scope)
seed_data_creation: N/A - using existing test user with 20,099 points
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rewards Shop overhaul complete. Gift Cards feature working with 10% bonus. Individual QR-code rewards removed. Wallet page 'Redeem Now' button routes to /rewards-shop correctly.

mocked_apis.Gift card purchase: MOCKED - Shows 'Coming Soon' alert (TODO in code)
mocked_apis.CherryHub CRM: MOCKED - Blocked by auth scopes (403 error)

rewards_shop_page_layout.details: Page renders with header (REDEEM POINTS), points balance, conversion rate (10 points = $1), how-to steps (3 steps), redemption grid (3-column with 6 items), gift cards (2x2 grid)

points_cost_calculation.details: 10 points per $1: 250 pts for $25, 500 for $50, 1000 for $100, 1500 for $150

custom_gift_card_input.details: Custom amount input works, shows bonus calculation, minimum $10 enforced

purchase_button_state.details: Button disabled when no gift card selected, shows 'Select a Gift Card' text

wallet_redeem_now_navigation.details: Wallet page 'Redeem Now' button routes to /rewards-shop correctly

api_verification./api/auth/login: PASS - Returns user with points_balance and token
api_verification./api/rewards: PASS - Returns 10 rewards with required fields
api_verification./api/points/balance: PASS - Returns points_balance, tier_id, tier_name, multiplier
